import type { SVGProps } from "react";

const NetflixIcon = (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) => (

    <defs id="defs4">

        />

        />

      <linearGradient

      <linearGradient

    </defs>
    <path

        strokeLinecap: "butt",
        strokeLinejoin: "miter",
        strokeOpacity: "1",

);

export { NetflixIcon };
